companies.name: Traeger Industry Components GmbH
companies.shortDescription:
Traeger Industry Components GmbH. Traeger Industry Components GmbH is a Automation Machinery Manufacturing company. i4.0 is a company that provides solutions for industrial communication, including the Smart Factory Upgrade. They offer software development kits and middleware for data analysis, diagnosis, and visualization. They aim to make businesses ready for the future of the industry. Traeger Industry Components GmbH employs 6 people (+10.0% YoY, +1 person), founded in 1992. Headquartered in Germany.
[...]
Founded in Etzenricht in 1992 as Träger Industriesoftware (TIS) and rebranded in Traeger Industry Components in 1998, the company – since 2012 based in Weiden in der Oberpfalz – operates as a sales, consulting and support company. The Traeger product portfolio serves the requirements of industrial communication technology. The focus is on communication in automation technology, especially in data acquisition via open and proprietary protocols in the industry. The historical experience in industrial communication technology positions the company as one of the leading providers of solutions for the requirements of Industry 4.0.

Software and hardware for the digitalisation of your production - For over 25 years, we have been a solution provider for manufacturing software and hardware in the context of digitalisation and Industry 4.0. Together with you, we design efficient and sustainable manufacturing processes. 

With comprehensive expertise in MES, machine data acquisition, production data acquisition, key performance indicators (KPI / OEE), dashboard management, quality management, ANDON board monitoring, mobile devices, label printing, energy data, graphic order planning and preventive maintenance, we offer you products and services for digital manufacturing. We are a supplier of a Manufacturing Execution System (MES) for the manufacturing industry. With the software product "MES-Software EMC", the company occupies a leading position in individual industries. EMC is a synonym for success (E) resulting from machine efficiency (M) and controlling (C). 

The modular MES software EMC for detailed production planning, operating, machine and process data acquisition (PDA/MDA/PDA) as well as monitoring and reporting enables the support and optimization of integrated production processes. The MES software EMC acts as a central information hub and ensures transparent production processes, flexibility and cost efficiency by integrating production data.
